body:
DAN cycle output: Transport/persistence ADR drafted (docs/DECISIONS/ADR-0001-transport-persistence.md; new dir). Design-only, no infra mutation. Full DAN report: _PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE_BASE/reports/DAN_COMPLETION_2026-06-14_TRANSPORT_ADR.md.

KEY: the ADR is NOT greenfield. While indexing I found you've already built the transport seam in ai_chi/bus/transports/ (FileBackedSigmaTransport, in use by autopoiesis_ledger + policy_gate; NatsTransportBridge). The ADR ratifies that direction (two-plane: fingerprinted append-only ledger = source of truth; transport = replaceable optimization; gates stay at the membrane). Recommended Option E (hybrid, phased, off by default).

NatsTransportBridge AUDITED = constitutionally clean: nats-py optional (imports clean offline, verified), localhost default (nats://127.0.0.1:4222), lazy-connect only on explicit .start(), federates THROUGH MembraneBus (gates at membrane). Safe to keep dormant; STARTING it (socket connect) is the stop-gated act = owner approval required.

ACTION ITEMS FOR YOU (your lane):
0) PRIORITY BUG: core/ledger/autopoiesis_ledger.py:12 'from datetime import UTC' is Python >=3.11 only. Fails import on 3.10 -> fails test_autopoiesis_ledger loader (suite otherwise clean, verify_floor True). Fix: 'from datetime import datetime, timezone' + use timezone.utc (portable to 3.9+). I did NOT patch (Auditor-Scribe).
1) Promote the seam to explicit protocols: define LedgerBackend + Transport; make FileBackedSigmaTransport + in-process router the default impls; adapt LedgerWriter to LedgerBackend. ZERO behavior change (suite stays green).
2) Add a membrane-conformance test asserting Omega-8/freshness/trust are re-applied on delivery through EVERY transport including NatsTransportBridge, so federation can never bypass the gate.

MY LANE NEXT (offered): ledger-integrity check (fingerprint chain + append-only) in the verification suite; full e2e audit of NatsTransportBridge before it is ever started.

No gate crossed. verify_floor True. 343 tests, 1 loader error = the 3.11 import above (environmental, not mine).
constraints: gates enforced at the membrane, never at transport
ledger (not any broker) is the single source of truth
forbidden_actions: start NatsTransportBridge / any socket connect without owner approval
objective: Deliver Transport/persistence ADR + route its action items (datetime fix; protocolize the existing transport seam; membrane-conformance test)
requested_output: PatchPlan: (0) datetime.UTC->timezone.utc fix; (1) LedgerBackend/Transport protocols around existing FileBackedSigmaTransport, zero behavior change; (2) membrane-conformance test across all transports incl. NATS
summary: Transport/persistence ADR-0001 drafted (design-only). Ratifies the already-emerging two-plane seam; NatsTransportBridge audited clean (optional/localhost/lazy/gates-at-membrane, dormant). Found + routed one real Codex-lane bug: autopoiesis_ledger datetime.UTC is 3.11-only (fails on 3.10). verify_floor True; 343 tests/1 environmental loader error.
